_comment: Author-supplied title library. Titles are drawn ONLY from here.
Each template declares what it `requires`. A template is only eligible when
every requirement can be filled from something real:
deck      - the match's win condition, from the reconstructed deck
overtime  - the match genuinely reached overtime (detected, sustained)
rank      - CHANNEL_RANK in .env; the author asserts it, nothing detects it
Templates needing facts the pipeline cannot establish -- win rates, trophy
counts, match outcomes, challenge results, meta standings -- are listed with
`requires: ["unverifiable"]`. They are kept here so they can be used by hand,
but are never auto-selected, because putting an unmeasured '85% win rate' or
'luckiest win ever' on a real channel is a claim with nothing behind it.
The winner of a match is NOT detected, so no template may imply an outcome.
